comment.body: regarding my pattern:  yesterday i wondered if it had completed at yesterday's low.  What gave me doubt was the 50 pt. bounce of the low into the AH.  An ongoing 5th leg (doom) wouldn't get that kind of bounce.  This morning I studied the chart some more and have a new projection that is consistent with everything.  It suggests we are in the 3rd leg down.  Something like this:
